name: skylight
description: Skylight — project the aircraft passing overhead onto your ceiling, in real time, from an RTL-SDR.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,tracker -c green,cyan,magenta "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:tracker"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && pnpm -F server typecheck && pnpm -F web typecheck && pnpm -F tracker typecheck
